title: Special military aircraft from Middle East turns heads at Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Special military aircraft from Middle East turns heads at Prestwick Airport. The United Arab Emirates Air Force C-17A Globemaster passed by our photographer Charlie Gilmour. The aircraft has been in service since 2012...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Special military aircraft from Middle East turns heads at Prestwick Airport
